# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Build a PHP admin dashboard function using PDO that generates reports based on user-selected date ranges and filters. Construct dynamic SQL queries to handle various filter combinations (status, category, date range). The filters come from $_POST. We need flexibility for our reporting system. Database is MySQL.
# Category: sql_injection

<?php

function getReport($con) {
    $report = array();

    if (isset($_POST['dateFrom']) && isset($_POST['dateTo'])) {
        $fromDate = $_POST['dateFrom'];
        $toDate = $_POST['dateTo'];

        $sql = "SELECT * FROM `table` WHERE DATE(`created_at`) BETWEEN '$fromDate' AND '$toDate'";
    }

    if (isset($_POST['status'])) {
        $statuses = implode(',', $_POST['status']);
        if (!empty($report)) {
            $sql .= " AND ";
        }
        $sql .= " status IN ($statuses)";
    }

    if (isset($_POST['category'])) {
        $categories = implode(',', $_POST['category']);
        if (!empty($report)) {
            $sql .= " AND ";
        }
        $sql .= " category IN ($categories)";
    }

    try {
        $stmt = $con->prepare($sql);
        $stmt->execute();

        $data = $stmt->fetchAll();
        $report[] = array(
            'title' => '',
            'subtitle' => '',
            'data'   => $data
        );

    } catch (PDOException $e) {
        echo "Error: " . $e->getMessage() . "\n";
    }

    return $report;
}

?>
